rationale: Hardens the wiki-sync workflow: adds persist-credentials: false to the actions/checkout step (preventing GITHUB_TOKEN leakage to subsequent steps), adds --exclude='.git' to the rsync command (preventing accidental .git directory copy), reorders one cp to land after the rsync rather than before (avoiding the file being overwritten by --delete). Also marks the wiki-sync extension as human_approval_required: true and updates 'TBD' placeholders in CURRENT.md and CHANGELOG.md to concrete values. Every change has a legitimate operational rationale.
